#PeekOnGround: The pink foam indicates the release of untreated dyes and industrial waste into the Yamuna \#PeekOnGround: The BJP government in Delhi is reportedly planning to buy two luxury VVIP boats worth over ₹6 crore to inspect the Yamuna, while the river reeks, covered in thick pink foam.

The pink foam indicates the release of untreated dyes and industrial waste into the Yamuna, despite strict rules against it.

But from chemical spraying to make the Yamuna look clean to luxury boats for VVIPs to ‘inspect’ the river, is PR the Delhi government’s priority over truly cleaning the holy river?

Here’s why Trans Bill 2026 should SCARE tf out of every SINGLE citizen of India. Doesn’t matter who you’re - man, woman, trans, just be paranoid. (I absolutely get that not everyone has the time or bandwidth to read through complex legislation, but the recent 2026 bill should concern ALL OF US. Even if you haven’t read the bill or you think it doesn’t affect you as a biological man or woman, READ THIS).

\- The bill has SIGNIFICANTLY departed from the framework established under the 2019 Act - ironically, passed by the SAME BJP GOVT. It has reopened something what many believed was a settled and a done & dusted issue.

\- More importantly, the bill is in COMPLETE CONTRAVENTION with established judicial precedents, including NALSA v. Union of India and other High Court rulings.

Even if you’re the MOST PRIVILEGED MAN or WOMAN, here’s STILL why it SHOULD SCARE YOU:

When a govt appears willing to override its own legislative intent and disregard binding judicial interpretations, it raises a broader question: \*how secure are any legal rights if they can be altered so abruptly?\*

Today it may affect one group. Tomorrow, it could be ANY OF US. (I hate to use slippery slope but dudeee)

\- Whatever little legal rights men have in this country can be changed OVERNIGHT without any constitutional checks?

\- Govt could decide to abruptly and arbitrarily criminalise ABORTION tomorrow? Just because it felt like doing so?

\- Govt could tomorrow CRIMINALISE pre-marital sex even between straight couples? Because WHO CARES?

And like lakhs of scenarios like this can be imagined. I trusted the GOVT but please WATCH OUT for your RIGHTS every day and CHERISH THEM each day (whatever little of those that you have).

Watched Dhurandhar- the revenge, and it didn't settle well for me. Oky, so I watched dhurandhar yesterday and I felt disappointed. Dhar blurred the line between propaganda and reality-based. The movie was overall good,  the action was good. But bgm wasn't as catchy as it was in 1st movie. Also there was some syncing issue in later half.  It had many raw emotional moments that won my heart. 

Now let's talk about propaganda: 


> Major iqbal (from isi) clearly stated that this time its not their government in India after Modi won elections in 2014. Clearly implying that congress was their party. (While talking to his Dad ig) 

> It is clearly shown that bjp acted to intells that RS sent and earlier govt didn't act on it which caused 26/11 attack

> The monetization was shown a masterstroke, it subtly imply that "yeah, maybe it happened and it's effect was real". Everyone is talking about it, so let's not dive deep into it.

> Isreal was clearly shown as a friend in this movie. R madhvan was clearly shown saying that ' u think Israel won't tell us'. They could have simply avoided this by saying 'and u think they wouldn't tell us' , just substituting Israel with they. Imo it during this geopolitical time it was not right for our censorboard to let pass any statement when clearly the govt is not giving any statement on this. 

> PM modi debuted in this movie. Yes literally, modi's old oath taking ceremony and demonetization clips were embedded. It was unsettling man, like this could have easily been avoided by just using an actor and making him look alike to modi. It wasn't a documentary that real clips were embedded into it.
